task_completion.description: Verify that the Fixed Product Tax (FPT) system is enabled in the Magento configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Sales > Tax > Fixed Product Taxes) showing the 'Enable FPT' dropdown set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new product attribute for the CA E-Waste Fee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Product Attribute configuration page showing Default Label 'CA E-Waste Fee', Catalog Input Type for Store Owner set to 'Fixed Product Tax', and Attribute Code set to 'california_ewaste_fee'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'CA E-Waste Fee' attribute is assigned to the 'Default' Attribute Set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Default' Attribute Set edit page (Stores > Attribute Sets) showing 'CA E-Waste Fee' (or 'california_ewaste_fee') placed in one of the active attribute groups (e.g., Product Details) in the middle column, and not in the 'Unassigned Attributes' column.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the edit page for the 'Business Laptop Pro' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Magento product edit page clearly showing the product name 'Business Laptop Pro' or SKU 'LAPTOP-001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the $12.50 tax rule for California is applied to the 'Business Laptop Pro' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the product edit page for 'Business Laptop Pro' showing the 'CA E-Waste Fee' FPT field with a row added containing Country 'United States' (or US), State/Region 'California', and Tax amount '12.50'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure the settings rather than executing direct database or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Magento Admin panel interface being navigated, forms being filled out, and buttons being clicked.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Magento web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows the Magento admin URL, and the page elements reflect a live web application, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write the expected outcome in a text file or console.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings are actively applied within the Magento configuration, attribute management, and product edit pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target product SKU is 'LAPTOP-001' (Business Laptop Pro). California's region_id is 12 and country_id is 'US'. The attribute code must be exactly 'california_ewaste_fee' and the label 'CA E-Waste Fee'. The tax amount must be exactly $12.50.
